decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id is corridor_webster-ave-bronx, which is the exact same corridor: both describe Webster Avenue in the Bronx from The Hub to Williamsbridge, based on the Bx41 route, sourced from the same document (2013_03_sbs_webster_bx_cb5). The registry record corridor_webster-ave-bronx already includes this source in its source_ids and matches on corridor_name, street, limits, from, to, borough, and description. Since the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is new per the rule that observations already resolving to their base record should not link to their own id. No other registry record (e.g., corridor_webster-ave-bronx-2012, corridor_webster-avenue-bronx-2012, corridor_webster-avenue-sbs) is a better match — the 2012 records lack specific limits and the SBS record has different limits (Harlem River to The Hub vs The Hub to Williamsbridge).

evidence_refs.source_quote: Based on the existing Bx41 route that carries over 20,000 daily riders. 5.3 miles from The Hub to Williamsbridge.
